title: The Island’s Secrets Push Forward
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #6, Usopp, Unknown person #7, Zoro, Unknown person #8, Robin as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa!! So that's how you do things, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I wasn't done beating her up yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, I guess that was the fastest way to finish this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I ended up getting way too big myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We've gotta put this fire out fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure, that bastard Loki took down the monsters...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But cleaning up this mess is gonna be a night- mare!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said Loki wasn't the one who killed King Harald.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel bad for doubting that before, but just look at this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aside from that, he's always causing us trouble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The CDC has its limits, you know?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We ma- naged to turn them back to white.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that rage- aeration didn't help them at all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: forgive us, chiefs!! We got swallowed up by that evil!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's okay. We couldn't resist it either...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they snap out of that demonic transfer- nation!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There are two or three left, right...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have been looking for a long time and I have been looking for a while now. I have been looking for a while now and I was looking for a while now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could it be because you're such a great doctor?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huh?!! I-I'm not happy at all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...When you com- plummet me like that, you idiot! <

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's gotta be it, zero!! Amazing!! Gaba BA BABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are we done here? What about the others?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No signs of enemies in the arti- sans VI- LIAGE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How- Ever, the fire's still spread-ding!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No enemies in the alco- hol village either, but the fire continues.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Put out any fires wherever they're still burn- ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also confirm whether the demons are dead or not... and where they are!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 58 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
